title: AdvancedAntiGrief
description: A lightweight simple, folia safe anti grief plugin. Customize any mob, entity grief in the config file
body:
# AdvancedAntiGrief
### Description:
- Manage mostly anything that can grief in any world.
- Including: Enderman, Creeper, Wither, Villager, Pig, Sheep, Ghast, EnderDragon, SilverFish, TNT, EndCrystal
- Stops the griefing only! Keeps vanillia damage and knockback.
### Configuration:
- Find the config.yml file to modify the config of this plugin
### Note:
- This only manages entity grief, it;s not designed to prevent player grief, residence plugins are alse needed.
